name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I'm counting on you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
This is our final FEC end-of-quarter deadline before the election. ||
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722432:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)

Peter,

We've got a big deadline just 7 days from now and we've really got to go big.

You know I'm not a politician, but believe me, I've been learning how it works -- **and the Federal Election Commission 's Third Quarter Deadline is here in just 7 days** -- at the end of the month on September 30th.

Peter, last month, I challenged our incredible supporters to help me set a new fundraising record -- and I sweetened the deal by personally matching contributions made to our campaign for the last 96 hours of August, and patriots like you responded with record-setting generosity!

**Now, since we must do even better at this last FEC End of Quarter Deadline of the race, I am again going to match your contribution, but this time I'm dedicating $2 million of my own resources to the effort to raise $20 million by midnight next Friday.**

[**Yes, you read that correctly -- right now your contribution of $25 will become $50. And your contribution of $100 will be $200.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722432:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)

Peter, I can only maintain this offer until next Friday, and I'm counting on you to contribute whatever you can afford to right now.

**I've gone ahead and filled out the check for you. All you have to do is select the amount you are able to afford and submit your double contribution.**

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722433:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)
**[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $500 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722433:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722434:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)
**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $200 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722434:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722435:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)
**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $100 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722435:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722436:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)
**[CONTRIBUTE $25 = $50 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722436:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)**

Look, Peter, I know a good opportunity when I see one, and this is one of them -- a deal that helps us both: I gain the invaluable support of another American patriot -- and you have my word, as your President, I will make sure we put America, and the American people -- first again.

Crooked Hillary and her Clinton Cash political machine are anxiously watching our campaign to see what support we have. **They would love to be able to report higher fundraising numbers than our team, and with your help that won't happen.**

Hillary has been preparing for this election her entire life. She has been stockpiling supporters for years, but she never envisioned having to face an opponent as tough and determined to win and take back our nation like me.

[**With your support we will Make America Great Again -- please take advantage of my Matching offer today!**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722432:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)

Sincerely,

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722432:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)

Donald J. Trump

[**P.S. -- Peter, you have an incredible opportunity to impact this race -- but only for the next 7 days -- so please get in the fight and take action before it's too late.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722432:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37722432:sTWPYWbuN:m:1:876315805:84442D1419493472ADBF204562A6F8C9:r)**

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
---

---

body: Peter -- this is important. Speaker Ryan sent out an urgent request to all conservatives: "I really need 1,535 grassroots conservatives to step up and help us close the gap." -Speaker Paul Ryan PITCH IN http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37733716:sf8twWbIN:m:3:1155937413:F2C967CB61B12CAB1A63D78EA980097E:r So far, only 375 conservatives have stepped up. We need $83,457 from grassroots conservatives to break the Democrats' momentum. Otherwise, there's a real chance Nancy Pelosi could become Speaker again. Will you break the Democrats' streak and help us win in November? Here's a link to help our movement: http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37733717:sf8twWbIN:m:3:1155937413:F2C967CB61B12CAB1A63D78EA980097E:r Thanks, Team Ryan -- Begin Forwarded Message -- From: Paul Ryan Date: September 22, 2016 Subject: Please read (not good) Fellow Conservative, I'll get right to it. We're at a disadvantage going into the final stretch of the election. Over the past three months, Nancy Pelosi crushed us in fundraising. In that time, they've outraised us by $16.6 million -- and that doesn't include the money President Obama raised for House Democrats this month. Fellow Conservative -- I want to hold Hillary Clinton accountable for her actions -- but I can't do that if Nancy Pelosi becomes Speaker. And with these numbers and this momentum, she may win back the House. This may be our LAST chance to break their momentum. Next week marks the final FEC quarterly deadline before the election. I really need 1,535 grassroots conservatives to step up and help us close the gap. Will you pitch in? EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTE: $25 http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37733718:sf8twWbIN:m:3:1155937413:F2C967CB61B12CAB1A63D78EA980097E:r EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTE: $50 http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37733719:sf8twWbIN:m:3:1155937413:F2C967CB61B12CAB1A63D78EA980097E:r EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTE: $75 http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37733720:sf8twWbIN:m:3:1155937413:F2C967CB61B12CAB1A63D78EA980097E:r EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTE: $100 http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37733721:sf8twWbIN:m:3:1155937413:F2C967CB61B12CAB1A63D78EA980097E:r Or pitch in another amount via this secure link: http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37733722:sf8twWbIN:m:3:1155937413:F2C967CB61B12CAB1A63D78EA980097E:r I need you to step up right away. Please don't let me down. Thank you, Speaker Paul Ryan P.S. It all comes down to this. The last FEC quarterly deadline before the election is our final opportunity to catch up to the Democrats before voters head to the polls. If we don't make up ground now, we'll be in big trouble. That's why I pledge to personally match every single gift made through this secure link: http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37733723:sf8twWbIN:m:3:1155937413:F2C967CB61B12CAB1A63D78EA980097E:r Prefer to donate by mail? subject: #ThanksObama for defending our environment!
body:
SIGN: Thank President Obama for all his hard work on the environment the last eight years » (https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3546&s_src=Dems.com&s_subsrc=ThanxObama)

Letter to President Obama:

“I’m so proud of what we’ve helped you accomplish over the past eight years. Thank you for everything you’ve done over the course of your administration. Let’s work to continue building on everything you’ve accomplished!”

ADD YOUR NAME (https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3546&s_src=Dems.com&s_subsrc=ThanxObama) FIRST NAME - What an eight years it’s been!

Under President Obama’s leadership, we’ve protected more public lands and waters than ever before; finalized the Clean Power Plan, our nation’s biggest step forward in the fight against climate change; achieved the historic international Paris climate agreement; and defeated the dirty and dangerous Keystone XL pipeline!

With so many climate change deniers in Congress who are hell bent on blocking any and all action to protect our environment, these achievements did not come easy.

President Obama has fought long and hard to defend our environment, protect our public lands and waters, and jumpstart a clean energy revolution -- And before he leaves office we want him to know how much we appreciate him! Will you sign the letter thanking the President?

President Obama has become the 21st century emblem of conservation: thank him for his commitment » (https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3546&s_src=Dems.com&s_subsrc=ThanxObama)

President Obama understands that climate change is the greatest long-term threat facing the world, and he has fought tooth and nail to take action.

(http://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3546&s_src=Dems.com&s_subsrc=ThanxObama) Here are just some of the great steps and accomplishments President Obama has taken to protect our environment all the while improving community health, increasing cultural awareness, and growing our economy:

Making the largest investment in clean energy in American history Setting historic fuel economy standards so Americans use less gas and save money Imposing a moratorium on new coal leasing on public lands Leading the way in securing the historic Paris Climate Agreement And permanently protecting more public lands and waters than any president in historyThere’s so much more we could add to this list, but not enough space to for all of them! Add your name today and send President Obama a thank you note for all he’s done to protect our health and environment.

Thank President Obama for his unprecedented dedication to protecting our environment » (https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3546&s_src=Dems.com&s_subsrc=ThanxObama)

Thanks to President Obama, the U.S. is showing tremendous environmental leadership, becoming a global leader against climate change, increasing access to clean energy, and so much more. Thank him today for his leadership on the environment!

Kristin Brown
Director of Digital Strategy
League of Conservation Voters

name: Russ Feingold
subject: David vs. Goliath (Wells Fargo).
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
The rich and powerful gamed the system, and thought they could get away with it. Except, for once, they got caught. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4540/1c469400/8503af/357a15d/3001360230/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/wells-fargo?utm_source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd-rs&source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd-rs&utm_campaign=Wells-Fargo&utm_medium=ema") Friend, This week, Senator Elizabeth Warren went toe-to-toe with the CEO of Wells Fargo in a committee hearing, shining a light on everything that's wrong with how Wall Street operates. She clearly struck a nerve -- because the video's been watched and shared millions of times. **During the hearing, Senator Warren called on the CEO of Wells Fargo to resign -- and I'm with her 100 percent.** **[I'm joining Senator Warren in calling on the CEO of Wells Fargo to resign. It's time for some accountability. If you're with us, add your name right now.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4540/1c469400/8503af/357a15d/3001360230/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/wells-fargo?utm_source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd-rs&source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd-rs&utm_campaign=Wells-Fargo&utm_medium=ema")** It's David vs. Goliath. The rich and powerful gamed the system, and thought they'd get away with it. _Except, for once, they got caught._ For years, executives at Wells Fargo put their employees in a terrible position, pushing for unrealistic profits and creating a culture where anything goes -- just as long as the bank made money. **In this culture of corruption, the executives at the top got richer while customers got fleeced. Then, when they got caught, they pointed fingers at their employees to avoid any kind of responsibility.** The big banks and the billionaires who run them think the law doesn't apply to them. It's beyond wrong: It's disturbing. And it's time for accountability. **[Enough is enough -- It's time to start setting this right. The first step is for the CEO of Wells Fargo to accept responsibility and resign. Add your voice next to mine and Senator Warren's if you agree.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4540/1c469400/8503af/357a15d/3001360230/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/wells-fargo?utm_source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd-rs&source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd-rs&utm_campaign=Wells-Fargo&utm_medium=ema")** Wall Street already has plenty of lackeys fighting for their interests in Congress. I'm running for the Senate because middle-class and working families need someone who'll fight for _them._ It's up to progressives like us to hold their feet to the fire. Thanks for standing with me. Sincerely, Russ Feingold | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4540/1c469400/8503af/357a15d/3001360230/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/wells-fargo?utm_source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd-rs&source=ema_2016-09-22_Wells-Fargo_nd-rs&utm_campaign=Wells-Fargo&utm_medium=ema")

venue from the lots.

The convention will gavel at 9:00am sharp and will run no later

clean_body: NHGOP STATE CONVENTION – 6th Notification 9/23/2016 This is the sixth notification of the 2016 NHGOP State Convention to be held on Saturday, September 24th at Saint Anselm College. All information about the State Convention can be found by visiting www.nh.gop/convention ( ). The proposed amendments have been posted. In order to propose an amendment at this point, the sponsor must download the form available at www.nh.gop/convention ( ) and procure the 10 signatures necessary to bring the amendment forward. The event will be held at the Dana Center on the campus of Saint Anselm College located at 100 St Anselm Dr, Manchester, NH 03102. Signs will be posted to facilitate parking and walking to the venue from the lots. The convention will gavel at 9:00am sharp and will run no later than 12:30pm. Registration will begin at 7:45am. The full delegate list has been posted as provided to us by the Secretary of State’s office. If you feel there is an error in the list, please email Ross@nhgop.org ( Ross@nhgop.org ). | **ICYMI: Bill Bryant Blasts Jay Inslee on Cover Up and Incompetence
** _Bryant Unveils 25,000 Keys to Illustrate Every Missing Master Key at WSH_

“GOP challenger Bill Bryant accuses Gov. Jay Inslee of incompetence, deception at Western State” _\- Seattle Times_

“Bryant displayed 25,000 keys on a table — the number of master keys that were found to be missing from Western State Hospital, according to a critical report on security lapses at the state facility.” _\- Seattle Times

_ “The keys represented the number of master keys that corrections officials discovered were missing from Western State Hospital during a security review in response to the escape of two violent patients. The corrections report was made public last week by The Associated Press.” _\- KING5 _

__“Tracing a litany of problems over many years, which have put the mental hospital’s federal funding in jeopardy, Bryant accused Inslee of poor management and even deception.” _-Seattle Times_
“Management was unwilling to recognize that failing to focus on security puts patients and the public at risk.” _\- KOMO/AP_

In case you missed it, this week Bill Bryant held a press conference outlining Governor Inslee’s failure and ongoing cover up of the deteriorating situation at Western State Hospital as well to display the sheer volume of the 25,000 master keys missing from Western State. During the conference Bryant reiterated his demand that Governor Inslee immediately release all reports on the structural weaknesses at Western State Hospital.

“The cumulative evidence woven together reveals negligence and incompetence at best and an election year cover up at worst,” said Bryant. “We did not learn anything from the problems at Western State from our elected governor. Nearly everything we learned have come from reporters who doggedly pursued the information”

You can watch the [full press conference here, along with various media clips](billbryantforgovernor.com/wshmedia) [](billbryantforgovernor.com/wshmedia)

name: Team Bayh
subject: No Budget? No Pay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504c4/7be36b49/1e9e2e0e/78f87b39/3049307662/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Dear Friend,

When Evan was governor of Indiana, he worked with the state legislature to pass a budget every year. But the U.S. Congress isn't held to the same standard. In fact, they've only passed a budget once in the last five years.

This is ridiculous. Hoosiers know the value of hard work. They know that if you don't do the work, you don't get paid. **It 's time to hold Congress to the same standard.**

That's why Evan supports the **No Budget, No Pay Act** , a proposal that would require Members of Congress to pass an annual budget in order to receive their salary.

**[Add your name if you agree that obstructionist lawmakers shouldn't get a paycheck if they can't pass a budget.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504c4/7be36b49/1e9e2e0e/78f87b38/3049307662/VEsE/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/when-americans-don-t-do-their-jobs-they-don-t-get-paid----and-congress-shouldn-t-be-any-different-")**

Congress' annual budget deadline is October 1 -- in just a week. Millions of people are depending on them to fund our schools, VA hospitals, and other critical services. When they fail to do so, they're leaving services like these, and the folks who rely on them, in a constant state of uncertainty.

It's time to hold our elected officials accountable when they refuse to do their jobs. **Hoosier taxpayers pay Congress ' salaries -- so let's make them earn their pay.**

**[Will you stand with Evan in support of the No Budget, No Pay Act?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504c4/7be36b49/1e9e2e0e/78f87b38/3049307662/VEsF/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/when-americans-don-t-do-their-jobs-they-don-t-get-paid----and-congress-shouldn-t-be-any-different-")**

Thanks,

| This was a very busy week for Team Scott with events, debates and more. It is always great to connect with Vermonters and share Phil’s plans for economic growth and making Vermont more affordable. Check out this week’s highlights from the state’s most energetic and hardworking campaign.

**PHIL CONTINUES TO SHARE HIS ECONOMIC MESSAGE**
Last week Phil released a comprehensive economic development plan, demonstrating why **he is the only candidate who will make the economy and affordability the top priorities in Montpelier**. (You can view the full plan [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8a62934be1&e=19cebfe173)). One of the key elements of his plan is protecting jobs and retaining employers. He will work to ensure Vermont’s job creators can be competitive in the regional, national and global markets.
To help Vermont retain and grow its employers, Phil will create a culture that **encourages and supports all employers** , **respects the investment they’re making** in our state, and **fights to protect every job and every company in every sector**. A Phil Scott Administration will work to **aggressively promote the export of Vermont products and services** and will **build a healthy and respectful open dialogue** with Vermont’s businesses. Read more [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f8afa0b3bb&e=19cebfe173).

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT

***
**A CLEAR CHOICE – CAN YOU AFFORD MORE TAXES?**
Phil has made clear throughout his campaign that **he will not propose – nor will he sign – a budget that grows faster than the economy or wages** , and that he does not believe Vermonters can afford any more taxes.

Now that **his opponent has proposed expanding a sales tax to services** , Phil assured Vermonters this week that **he will veto any legislation proposing a new sales tax on services**.

“**Child care, cleaning services, accounting and bookkeeping, home heating maintenance and repair, barbers and hairdressers, website developers** – the list goes on and on and on,” said Phil in a statement. “**Add to this the $700 million in costs imposed on Vermonters by my opponent’s party over the last seven years** – and the promise from some legislative leaders to advance a new ‘carbon tax’ on transportation and home heating fuels that could add as much as 88-cents to a gallon of gas – **and you get a very clear picture of what is at stake in this election**.”

Read Phil’s full statement [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=447808f0e2&e=19cebfe173), and read more about the impact of his opponent’s plan to raise a tax on services in the [Times Argus](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4ad11244f4&e=19cebfe173) and [Caledonian Record](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=79042f36ee&e=19cebfe173).
*******
**VERMONT COMMISSION ON WOMEN DEBATE**
Phil participated in a forum this week sponsored by the Vermont Commission on Women, the League of Women Voters, and Vermont Federation of Business and Professional Women. At the event, he **highlighted the influence of independent women in his life – his mom, his aunt and his daughters, to name a few – and _his support for equal pay, women’s rights, affordable childcare and STEM programs_**.

Phil made it clear in the debate that, despite how his opponent’s surrogates have tried to paint him, he is pro-choice and supports both marriage equality and equal pay for equal work. Scott touted his **record of supporting legislation to require equal pay for equal work regardless of gender** , among other initiatives. Phil also expressed **his commitment to _enhancing early education opportunities_ and identifying new ways to _make childcare more affordable_**.

Read more about the debate [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a709f0b33c&e=19cebfe173).

**A FEW FAIRS IN BETWEEN DEBATES**
While participating in forums for the **Vermont Affordable Housing Coalition** and the **Vermont Commission on Women** , Phil and Team Scott also attended a **POW ceremony at Camp Johnson** and a meeting of the **Essex Rotary**. Phil swung by the **Tunbridge Fair** , **Sandy’s Drive-in in Sharon** , and the **National Street Rod Association** show, before walking in a **Plainfield** parade.

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT
Stay up-to-date on our upcoming events [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d581a16a28&e=19cebfe173).

**YOU’RE INVITED: WE WANT YOU AT OUR DEBATES**
By the end of the General Election, Phil will have participated in 11 debates (plus many more during the Primary!). But each debate is important, and we want you there with us! We have two debates this week, and **we hope you will join Team Scott to support Phil and** **hear directly from him about** **how _he’ll fight for you in Montpelier_**.

**Join us this week at:**

[**Windsor County Gubernatorial Forum**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d30b0a47c5&e=19cebfe173)**Event**
September 25
4:00 pm - 6:30 pm (Forum is from 5-6:30 pm**)**
[Damon Hall](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=7b0ff8c637&e=19cebfe173), 1 Quechee Rd, Hartland, VT United

[**VT Digger Debate**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=46a1f3940d&e=19cebfe173)
September 28
6:00 pm - 8:00 pm
[Paramount Theatre](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=70b0e4aeac&e=19cebfe173), 30 Center St. Rutland, VT 05701 United States
***
**ICYMI: PHIL IN THE NEWS**

**_Caledonian Record: The right choice for Vermont_**
“Lt. Gov. Phil Scott, the Republican candidate for governor, said Monday that he will veto any sales tax on services. We think Scott has a lot better grasp of economics, and the facts of life in eastern Vermont, than Minter.” (Source: Caledonian Record: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=9192057993&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil: My focus is on the economy_**
“My standard for evaluating public policy is very clear: If an idea decreases the costs of living and doing business here, I will support it. If it increases costs, I will oppose it. It’s that simple.” (Source: VT Digger: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=510d445285&e=19cebfe173))

**_Time to abandon our disastrous health exchange_**
"If elected, gubernatorial Republican candidate Phil Scott has said he would abandon [Vermont Health Connect], while Democratic candidate Sue Minter says she will expand the program." (Source: Vermont Watchdog: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=60404bbbf2&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil: We have to do more_**
“It's impossible to be a dad today and not see that there’s work to do. I look forward to working with all of you to make sure that our daughters have every opportunity." (Source: Burlington Free Press: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=68fe67c36c&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil: Enforce our current gun laws, and focus legislative efforts on the economy_**
**“** Scott's platform is simple: he thinks Vermont doesn't need any new gun laws. He says he'd veto new gun laws unless they expanded funding for firearm training. ‘We should enforce the ones that are on the books and we should focus on the economy,’ Scott said.” (Source: WCAX: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=dbe710b301&e=19cebfe173))
***
**ICYMI: THIS WEEK’S #GOODREADS**

**Rob Roper: Is expanding sales tax to services really Minter’s goal?**
Ethan Allen Institute President Rob Roper took a look at the impact of expanding sales tax to services, after Phil’s opponent said she’d consider expanding this tax last week. Roper points out, as have many others, that a services tax would **add a tax to as many as 168 services** including legal fees, childcare, home repairs and haircuts. **“****That’s a lot of day-to-day expenses that will all of a sudden _be between 2 and 6 percent less affordable_ for Vermonters,”** writes Roper. Who among us can afford up to 6% more on childcare alone? **Phil is the only candidate who understands that Vermonters cannot afford more taxes and fees**. Read more about his promise to veto an expansion of sales tax to services [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=05d71fcb67&e=19cebfe173), and Mr. Roper’s full article [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5817240d4b&e=19cebfe173).
*******
Thanks to everyone for continuing to follow and support our campaign. Be sure to follow along with the campaign’s activities every day – and share your thoughts – [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=919887a991&e=19cebfe173) and [https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2d31b608c6&e=19cebfe173).

Sincerely,
Team Scott

body:
---
Friend --

Monday is the last financial deadline before Montanans begin casting ballots.

This is not a drill. I will be making critical October spending decisions early next week. And these decisions will be based on whether or not we hit our September goal. It's really that simple.

**[Will you help and donate $13?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=L6BlC7V5h4rK5lYTlch1ZRxRTOtToUCX)**

| [](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=TAiCyYf2c6VdLQHWO4G%2BQLHT1%2FMV1S6c)

| | For Immediate Release:
September 23, 2016

Media Contact: Brittney Wilson
802-274-2722 **MEDIA ADVISORY** **Phil Scott to Announce Plans for Full Separation from Business if Elected **
**WHAT: Phil Scott to Announce Full Separation from Business if Elected**
Middlesex, Vt. – At the 70th anniversary celebration of his family business, Phil Scott will announce his plan for a full and complete separation from the 70-year-old central Vermont construction company he has co-owned and run for more than 30 years, if he is elected Governor.

“I first ran for the Senate to bring the voice of small businesses and their employees to Montpelier. Even though I would have never guessed it then, I have come to understand that this work -- the work of making sure the voice of every working Vermonter, every employer, and every family is heard in Montpelier -- is needed now more than ever,” Scott said. “That's why, after 6 years of watching the economy and affordability be put on the back burner, I decided to step up and run for Governor. And I want every Vermonter to know that I will be a full-time Governor, focused entirely on serving the people of our state and fully committed to restoring the faith and trust in government that has been lost in the last 6 years.”

**WHEN: Saturday, September 24th, 2016 – 12:00 p.m. **

**WHERE: DuBois Construction, 46 Three Mile Bridge Road, Middlesex**

---
Friend,

As the Director of the Indiana Democratic Party Coordinated Campaign, I work closely with the volunteers who make our campaign run. As Election Day draws nearer, these all-stars are working even harder and putting in even longer hours toward the goal of electing Evan.

I want to make sure we're doing everything we can for them -- but funds are tight. That's why, for one day only, we're reopening Team Bayh's Volunteer Support Fund with a goal of 250 donors. **[If you're not able to volunteer yourself, will you consider donating $5 to our Volunteer Support Fund?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504c2/7be36b49/1e9c1e03/78f87943/3959860249/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-volunteersupportfund?refcode=20160923.2nd&amount=10")**

Your contribution to this special fund will go toward things like:
* More phones to help our new influx of volunteers call voters
* Snacks and water for extended volunteering sessions
* Technology to help our volunteer canvassers navigate the cities and towns our campaign is in

I know we ask for a lot, friend -- but our volunteers are the heart of this campaign. **[If you can give, I know they'd appreciate your support.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504c2/7be36b49/1e9c1e03/78f87943/3959860249/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-volunteersupportfund?refcode=20160923.2nd&amount=10")**

Best,

Peter Hanscom
